news.headline: Businesses are increasingly experimenting with Gen AI tools, with 36% involved. Concerns about risks linger, as 58% call for improved data security policies.
news.summary: A recent survey found that 36% of business executives have started experimenting with Gen AI tools. Additionally, around one-third of respondents expressed significant concerns about the risks associated with Gen AI. The survey also revealed that 58% of participants believe their companies require enhanced data security measures and policies for the use of Gen AI. The survey was conducted in New York on December 12th.

news.headline: HashKey Chain launches $50M Atlas Grant Program to empower Web3 devs globally, drive innovation in OP Stack ecosystem.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on December 10, 2024, HashKey Chain revealed the launch of the Atlas Grant Program valued at $50 million. This program is designed to provide assistance to Web3 projects worldwide. Its primary objective is to spark creativity within the OP Stack ecosystem, expedite HashKey Chain's application layer expansion, and enhance on-chain development efforts.

news.headline: iTeos presents A2A-005 trial data at ESMO with 63.9% ORR and median PFS of 7.7 months for all patients. RP2D showed 73.3% ORR, 64.6% 6-month PFS. Inupadenant safety manageable. Deprioritized for other programs.
news.summary: Results from the Phase 2 A2A-005 trial showed that the combination of inupadenant with carboplatin/pemetrexed achieved an overall response rate (ORR) of 63.9% and a median progression-free survival (PFS) of 7.7 months for all participants. The recommended Phase 2 dose (RP2D) of inupadenant at 80mg in combination with carboplatin/pemetrexed resulted in a 73.3% ORR, with 64.6% of patients reaching a 6-month PFS milestone. The safety profile of the inupadenant + carboplatin/pemetrexed combination was reported as manageable and tolerable, with no observable dose-dependent toxicity. As a result of these findings, inupadenant has been deprioritized to allocate resources to other programs.

news.headline: Kidneyhood.org introduces study in new book on kidney diets, aiming to help manage kidney disease.
news.summary: A recently published book, The Evidence-Based Guide to Kidney and Renal Diets, is being lauded as a valuable resource for individuals managing kidney disease through diet. Released by Kidneyhood.org on December 12, 2024, the book introduces an innovative approach to navigating kidney disease with a focus on dietary practices. Featuring new findings, the book aims to assist individuals in making informed decisions regarding their diet to support renal health. This comprehensive guide presents evidence-based strategies and recommendations to enhance the management of kidney disease.

news.headline: LPL Financial adds Prestige Wealth Group advisors, managing $540M in assets, joining from Osaic.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, LPL Financial LLC (Nasdaq: LPLA) revealed that the advisors at Prestige Wealth Group (PWG), overseen by Rich Galgano, CFP®, and Matt Geraci, CFP®, have become part of LPL Financial's broker-dealer, RIA and custodial platforms. They bring with them a client base comprising around $540 million in assets under advisory, brokerage, and retirement plans* as they transition from Osaic to LPL.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: Recovery is slower than expected.
ECB's President Lagarde: Exports should support recovery if trade tensions don't escalate.
Hacker crashes 69% of Dogecoin nodes, but DOGE price spikes 1.8%. Vulnerability exploited by Andreas Kohl from El Salvador. 647 nodes reduced to 315.
news.summary: A severe vulnerability in the Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) network has resulted in a significant disruption, causing 69% of its nodes to be inactive. Despite this, there was no notable impact on the price of Dogecoin. Andreas Kohl, co-founder of Sequentia, admitted to exploiting the flaw on Dec. 12 in El Salvador using a basic laptop. Prior to the incident, there were 647 active Dogecoin nodes, a number that dropped drastically to 315 post-exploit. Kohl disclosed that the exploit utilized a vulnerability identified by researcher Tobias Ruck, underscoring a critical weakness in the network's security.

news.headline: Trump-backed crypto venture links with controversial platform Tron, associated with terrorist groups. Raised $30M investment.
news.summary: A new cryptocurrency venture tied to U.S. President-elect Donald Trump has formed a partnership with a platform connected to questionable activities. World Liberty Financial Inc, a crypto project launched by Trump and billionaire Steve Witkoff, has joined forces with the Tron crypto platform as per Reuters. Tron has been linked to terrorist organizations, raising concerns among financial crime experts. Known for its efficiency compared to Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), Tron has reportedly facilitated crypto transactions involving said groups. Tron recently invested $30 million in World Liberty, with founder Justin Sun involved in the deal.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: Firms are holding back investments.
ECB's President Lagarde: The labour market is resilient.
ECB's President Lagarde: Demand for labor continues to weaken.
New Employee Portal for ABA practices streamlines management with centralized document storage; launched by Wilma™ in Diablo, CA.
news.summary: A recently updated portal offers secure and centralized document management, supporting ABA practices in maintaining compliance and efficiency. Introduced in Diablo, California on December 12, 2024, Wilma™, an AI-driven practice management system tailored for ABA therapy providers, aims to streamline operations. The portal enhances document security and organization, benefiting practices by ensuring regulatory adherence. This advancement in technology will help ABA practices in managing a large volume of documents accurately and securely.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: Growth is losing momentum.
ECB's President Lagarde: Exports are weak.
China's Central Economic Work Conference: We will maintain basic stability of yuan exchange rate at a reasonable and balanced level - Xinhua.
Riot Hospitality Group to open Scottsdale's first fine dining supper club in 2025 at 7373 E Camelback Rd.
news.summary: A new culinary experience is set to make its mark in Scottsdale, Arizona as Riot Hospitality Group reveals plans to launch the city's premier fine dining supper club in early 2025. The Shiv Supper Club will be situated in Old Town at 7373 E Camelback Rd, offering a unique dining experience unlike any other in the area. This innovative venture will introduce Scottsdale to a bold new concept in dining, promising to elevate the local culinary scene. Stay tuned for more updates as the opening date approaches.

news.headline: New Kiddie Academy in Holly Springs focuses on early tech education in Raleigh, NC. Opened on Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: Engineering professionals have applied their expertise to the newly opened franchise location of Kiddie Academy Educational Child Care in Holly Springs Towne Center, N.C. The Raleigh-area facility officially opened on December 12, 2024. This new location is part of the nationally acclaimed franchise, adding to their network of childcare centers.

news.headline: Producer inflation in U.S. rises more than expected to 3% in November, with PPI climbing 0.4% monthly. Economists forecasted 2.6%. Fed's interest rates under scrutiny.
news.summary: In November, U.S. producer prices saw a significant increase, surpassing expectations and fueling concerns about ongoing inflation trends. The producer price index surged by 3% year-over-year, the highest since February 2023, compared to the previous month's 2.6% and economist forecasts of 2.6%. This data, released on Thursday, coincided with an uptick in consumer price index inflation to 2.7% annually. On a monthly basis, the PPI rose by 0.4%, exceeding the previous month's 0.3% and the expected 0.2%. Excluding volatile items, the core PPI also rose by 3.4% annually, in line with the 3.4% reported in October. This data raises concerns about the broader economic outlook for inflation in the country.

news.headline: Sacks Parente Golf, Inc. priced an upsized $8.4 million public offering for golf products like putters and shafts.
news.summary: In Camarillo, CA, on Dec. 12, 2024, Sacks Parente Golf, Inc. (NASDAQ: SPGC) disclosed the pricing of a firm commitment underwritten public offering. The technology-driven golf company, known for its diverse range of golf merchandise such as putters, golf shafts, grips, and accessories, is set to generate around $8.4 million in gross proceeds from the offering. This total is stated before the subtraction of underwriting fees and additional estimated offering expenses that will be covered by the Company.

news.headline: Lumos Pharma acquired by Double Point Ventures for $38 million, $4.25 per share, includes contingent value right for future payments.
news.summary: Lumos Pharma, a biopharmaceutical company, and Double Point Ventures have completed a tender offer for Lumos Pharma’s shares at $4.25 per share in cash at closing, along with one contingent value right for each share. This deal represents an equity value of around $38 million, which is 7.6% higher than Lumos Pharma’s closing share price on Oct 22, 2024. The CVRs offer potential additional cash payments based on milestone events related to global net revenue of LUM-201 up to 2037. The agreement also covers future transactions and revenue agreements within 18 months of closing.

news.headline: EMA's CHMP adopts positive opinion for update to Ozempic® label, reflecting kidney disease risk reduction data. FLOW trial assessed risk reduction in CKD-related events for adults with type 2 diabetes, chronic kidney disease, including ≥50% decline in eGFR, onset of eGFR <15 ml/min/1.73 m2, initiation of kidney replacement therapy, kidney or cardiovascular death.
news.summary: Denmark's Bagsværd-based Novo Nordisk revealed today that the European Medicines Agency's Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) has given a favorable opinion for updating the label of Ozempic® (a once-weekly subcutaneous semaglutide) to incorporate findings from the FLOW kidney outcomes trial. This trial evaluated the effectiveness of Ozempic® treatment in reducing the risk of chronic kidney disease-related issues in adults with type 2 diabetes and chronic kidney disease. The trial specifically focused on outcomes such as a persistent decline of at least 50% in estimated glomerular filtration rate (eGFR), the onset of a persistent eGFR below 15 ml/min/1.73 m2, the necessity for chronic kidney replacement therapy, kidney-related mortality, and cardiovascular-related mortality.

news.headline: Experts at Yerevan conference urge clear safeguards in Armenia's media self-regulation law for independence and transparency.
news.summary: During a conference held in Yerevan by The Armenia Project, experts emphasized the importance of independence and transparency. The event took place on December 12, 2024, and included prominent media personalities and democracy supporters. Discussions centered around the need for clarity and autonomy within Armenia's governance structures. Important issues regarding accountability and openness were addressed by panelists, with an emphasis on promoting democratic values.

news.headline: ECB Press Conference - Watch Here
Prescient Edge launches new website, utilizing AI and machine learning to defend every domain. Veteran-owned PEC leading digital transformation. Washington, Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: A respected technology integrator has successfully implemented advanced tactics involving artificial intelligence and machine learning to help transition partners into the digital era. Operating in Washington, the veteran-owned Prescient Edge Corporation (PEC) has become a leader in this endeavor. Utilizing cutting-edge strategies, PEC is at the forefront of the digital transformation, bringing partners up to speed in today's fast-evolving technological landscape. The company's initiatives mark a significant step forward in leveraging AI and ML, demonstrating its commitment to innovation and adaptability.

news.headline: Charity Navigator unveils Beneficiary Voices Fund to support nonprofits valuing feedback from beneficiaries.
news.summary: A new fund has been established in New York on Dec. 12, 2024, by Charity Navigator, the largest nonprofit organization evaluator in the U.S. The Beneficiary Voices Fund invests in nonprofits that give importance to receiving feedback from the beneficiaries they serve. This fund features a carefully selected list of nonprofit organizations that prioritize beneficiary input.

news.headline: Global Cyber Alliance predicts top six cybersecurity trends for 2025, aiming to enhance internet security.
news.summary: In efforts to enhance cybersecurity measures, the Global Cyber Alliance (GCA), a prominent nonprofit organization committed to enhancing Internet security, has disclosed its forecast for the primary cybersecurity trends anticipated in 2025. The organization is renowned for its dedication to improving online security. The predictions are set to target emerging cyber threats and advancements in technology that may impact global cyber defenses. The GCA's insights aim to inform individuals and organizations about potential risks and encourage proactive measures to combat cybercrime. Stay updated to learn more about the upcoming cybersecurity trends and ways to safeguard against evolving digital threats.

news.headline: ZEPA welcomes InductEV as newest member to accelerate port decarbonization. InductEV aims to make battery-electric container handling equipment affordable and accessible. Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: A leading industry group aims to expedite the decarbonization efforts at ports by focusing on making Battery-Electric Container Handling Equipment (BE-CHE) more affordable and accessible. The group, including wireless EV charging innovator InductEV, is striving to advance this goal. The initiative was announced in King of Prussia, Pa., on Dec. 12, 2024. This move is crucial as ports globally work towards reducing emissions and adopting sustainable practices. The introduction of BE-CHE could significantly contribute to achieving this goal.

news.headline: Northern Tool + Equipment's 16th location in Florida opens in Orange Park with an appearance by Grave Digger Monster Jam® truck.
news.summary: This marks the opening of Northern Tool + Equipment's 16th establishment in Florida, situated in Orange Park. The grand opening event on December 21, 2024, will feature the iconic Grave Digger Monster Jam® truck from 11:00 a.m. to 3:00 p.m.

news.headline: NutriFusion teams up with Whole Dogg for Canada's 1st vet formulated dog supplement, now also in US; launched on Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: NutriFusion®, a pioneering supplement, is expanding its availability to the US market, delivering vital nutrients sourced from natural ingredients to dog diets throughout North America. This development was announced on December 12, 2024, in Naples, Florida. The supplement, known for its concentrated micronutrient and phytonutrient-rich composition, will now reach a wider audience in North America.

news.headline: Archer and Anduril partner to develop hybrid VTOL aircraft for military; raise $430M. Speeding up DOD program.
news.summary: A partnership has been revealed between Anduril and Archer (NYSE: ACHR) in Santa Clara, California. They have teamed up to co-create a hybrid VTOL aircraft catering to crucial defense uses, aiming at a potential program from the DOD. Leveraging Archer's swift development of cutting-edge VTOL aircraft via commercial parts and supply chains alongside Anduril's proficiency in AI, missionization, and system integration, this collaboration will hasten the pace to market for this project.

news.headline: Globalstar achieves first 5G data call on band n53 spectrum, achieving 100 Mbps download and 60 Mbps upload speeds.
news.summary: Globalstar, Inc. revealed today the successful completion of the first 5G data call on their Globalstar band n53™ spectrum. This accomplishment showcased impressive speeds of 100 Mbps for downloads and 60 Mbps for uploads. These enhanced speeds open doors for critical applications like robotics, autonomous forklifts, AR applications, and improved video capabilities to function smoothly. The test was carried out with the utilization of XCOM technology. This development is significant as it pushes the boundaries of mobile satellite and communication services and marks a milestone in the integration of 5G technology, offering higher efficiency for various industries.

news.headline: ECB slashes rates 3rd time in a row.
Full Circles Therapeutics reaches milestone with groundbreaking study in Nature Biotechnology on immune cell engineering.
news.summary: In a significant development, Full Circles Therapeutics, based in CAMBRIDGE, Mass., revealed the publication of a pioneering study in Nature Biotechnology on Dec. 12, 2024. The company, specializing in advanced cell and gene therapies, also confirmed the acquisition of a crucial patent. This study could potentially revolutionize the field, as their research insights promise to contribute substantially to the scientific community's understanding.

news.headline: Syrian American Medical Society (SAMS) commits to offering healthcare as Syria's government collapses after 50 years.
news.summary: The collapse of the Syrian Government, led by the Assad family for 50 years, has been confirmed. In response, the Syrian American Medical Society (SAMS) has reaffirmed its dedication to delivering top-notch healthcare services to the people of Syria. This commitment comes after years of providing support, showcasing a strong resolve to continue assistance during this tumultuous period.

news.headline: Helios adds crypto processing for global payroll funding, offering flexibility in paying global teams. Dec 2024 - Chicago.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Chicago, Helios, a top global workforce management platform utilizing AI, introduced enhanced flexibility for companies to pay international teams in compliance. This is made possible by incorporating cryptocurrency for funding payroll needs.

news.headline: Parents and kids can text Santa this holiday season through Los Feliz Flea, offering a direct line to the jolly guy. Los Angeles, Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: Los Feliz Flea market, a well-known local venue, has joined forces with a messaging plug-in to offer a direct communication channel with Santa Claus. This initiative, launched in Los Angeles on December 12, 2024, enables parents and kids to engage with the iconic figure in a novel way. This collaboration enhances the holiday experience by allowing attendees to connect directly with Santa through interactive means at the flea market. It introduces a unique twist to the traditional practice and provides a new level of engagement for families during this festive period.

news.headline: Electroceuticals & Bioelectric Medicine market to reach USD 10 billion by 2027, expecting 15.5% CAGR growth amid technological advancements.
news.summary: The field of electroceuticals, or bioelectric medicine, is rapidly advancing, using electrical impulses to diagnose and treat medical conditions. This technology is proving valuable in addressing various challenges, particularly in chronic diseases like rheumatoid arthritis and cardiovascular disorders. The global electroceuticals market is set to reach around USD 10 billion by 2027, with a projected compound annual growth rate of 15.5%. The market primarily consists of segments like cardiac pacemakers & ICDs, transcutaneous electrical nerve stimulators, and deep brain stimulators, with cardiac devices leading in revenue contribution. Despite challenges like limited insurance coverage and regulatory complexities, the market is expected to grow due to increasing demand for non-invasive therapies and ongoing technological advancements.

news.headline: Teton Gravity Research releases documentary "Kai Jones' Falling Into Place" on ski star's triumph.
news.summary: "Kai Jones' Rise to Success" offers an authentic portrayal of the challenging path and eventual victory of a rising star in the sports world. Set in JACKSON HOLE, Wyo., on Dec. 12, 2024, Teton Gravity Research (TGR), known for its innovative action sports movies, reveals the story of one of the youngest legends in the industry.

news.headline: Multifamily property owners are missing out on billions by mispricing parking, as per Neighbor's report.
news.summary: A recent report, the Multifamily Parking Intelligence Report, revealed that multifamily property owners and operators in Lehi, Utah, are failing to maximize their revenue potential by not optimizing parking prices. This oversight has resulted in billions of dollars in untapped revenue. The report is based on the largest dataset of multifamily properties and highlights the significant financial opportunities that are being missed out on.

news.headline: Gibson Area Hospital starts "Project One" with MEDITECH Expanse, as the 5th largest Critical Access Hospital.
news.summary: In Canton, Massachusetts, Gibson Area Hospital and Health Services (GAHHS) in Gibson City, Illinois, recently announced their partnership with MEDITECH Expanse, becoming the nation's 5th largest Critical Access Hospital. The hospital, which has been independently providing healthcare services for 72 years, serves eight counties through its main hospital campus and 29 individual locations. This move signifies GAHHS's commitment to growth and enhancing their service offerings to their communities.

news.headline: Saint-Gobain Group reinvested in Shenzhen's Luohu district, attracting global investments; a Global Fortune 500 company.
news.summary: In December 12, 2024, in Shenzhen, China, Saint-Gobain Group, a renowned global provider of lightweight and eco-friendly construction solutions, decided to reinvest in the Luohu district. This French industrial powerhouse, recognized as a part of the Global Fortune 500 companies, identifies Luohu as a promising location for its operations.

news.headline: Majesco named top leader for Life Insurance & Annuity and P&C Core Insurance Platforms in 2024 SPARK Matrix™.
news.summary: In Morristown, NJ, on December 12, 2024, Majesco, a prominent company specializing in cloud insurance technology, was acknowledged for its excellence in the technology sector. The company secured the top spot in the 2024 SPARK Matrix™ by QKS Group for Life Insurance Policy Administration System and P&C Insurance Platforms. This recognition reaffirms Majesco's position as a global leader in the industry.

news.headline: PGIM's Collins argues rates are compelling at current levels, as interest rates remain low.
Logility (NASDAQ: LGTY) responds to market rumors with no comment. Leading AI supply chain solutions provider.
news.summary: Logility Supply Chain Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: LGTY) released a statement addressing recent market rumors and media reports, confirming their policy of refraining from commenting on speculations. Logility specializes in AI-driven supply chain management solutions aimed at enhancing digital supply chains for a positive global impact.

news.headline: Imperial (TSE: IMO, NYSE American: IMO) outlines its 2025 corporate guidance, focusing on value maximization and growth opportunities for industry-leading returns to investors.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, Imperial (TSE: IMO, NYSE American: IMO) released an update on its corporate guidance for 2025, with a focus on maximizing asset value and advancing lucrative growth prospects. The strategy aims to offer top returns to shareholders by enhancing operational performance. The plan for 2025 includes boosting volumes and reducing unit cash costs to ensure greater efficiency.

news.headline: Westinghouse and BWXT Canada partner for nuclear projects, MoU signed for AP1000® and AP300™ components.
news.summary: In Peterborough, Ontario, Westinghouse Electric Company and BWXT Canada, Ltd. have entered into a memorandum of understanding (MoU) to aid nuclear new-build ventures in Canada and around the world. This collaboration allows BWXT Canada to potentially produce crucial components for AP1000® and AP300™ reactors, such as steam generators, reactor vessels, pressure vessels, and heat exchangers. BWXT's exceptional manufacturing facilities are crucial for meeting the demands of nuclear projects globally.

news.headline: BWXT Canada & Westinghouse sign MOU for AP1000 & AP300 projects, aiming to support nuclear projects globally and manufacture key reactor components.
news.summary: In Ontario, BWXT Canada, Ltd., a subsidiary of BWX Technologies, Inc., and Westinghouse Electric Company have entered a memorandum of understanding. This collaboration aims to bolster nuclear new-build projects in Canada and worldwide. As per the agreement, BWXT may produce crucial components for AP1000® and AP300™ reactors such as steam generators, reactor vessels, pressure vessels, and heat exchangers. This partnership is set to enhance the capabilities in the nuclear power sector.

news.headline: EnerSys (NYSE: ENS) wins German ESG Transparency Award for outstanding ESG initiatives - recognized for transparency and accountability.
news.summary: EnerSys, a worldwide leader in stored energy solutions for industrial uses, has recently received the prestigious German ESG Transparency Award for their outstanding commitment to transparency and accountability in environmental, social, and governance (ESG) practices. This award is a significant recognition given annually in Germany to organizations showcasing excellence in ESG initiatives. EnerSys, listed on the NYSE as ENS, stands out as a top performer in this regard and continues to set the benchmark for others in the industry.

news.headline: Electrified Thermal receives $19M funding from Holcim and GVP Climate to commercialize Joule Hive Thermal Battery for decarbonizing industrial heat processes.
news.summary: Holcim, a prominent firm in the building materials industry, and climate tech investor GVP Climate have joined an investment round to support the advancement of the commercial demonstration of Electrified's Joule Hive™ Thermal Battery. This initiative aims to decarbonize industrial heat processes. The Boston-based company secured significant funding on Dec. 12, 2024, for this purpose.
